name: github
summary: Wrapper for the official GitHub CLI (gh) with workspace proxy defaults

commands.name: native
commands.summary: Forward all remaining arguments to the official GitHub CLI

args.name: args
args.summary: Native gh arguments, for example --help, repo list, issue list, pr checks, or api user

commands.name: version
commands.summary: Show GitHub CLI version

commands.name: auth
commands.summary: Forward to gh auth for login, status, refresh, setup-git, or token management

args.name: args
args.summary: Auth subcommand and options, for example status, login, refresh, or setup-git

commands.name: browse
commands.summary: Forward to gh browse to open repositories, issues, pull requests, and other GitHub pages in the browser

args.name: args
args.summary: Browse target and options, for example owner/repo, --branch, --commit, or --no-browser

commands.name: codespace
commands.summary: Forward to gh codespace to connect to and manage GitHub Codespaces

args.name: args
args.summary: Codespace subcommand and options, for example list, create, ssh, stop, delete, or code

commands.name: gist
commands.summary: Forward to gh gist to list, view, create, edit, clone, or delete gists

args.name: args
args.summary: Gist subcommand and options, for example list, view <id>, create <file>, edit, or delete

commands.name: repo
commands.summary: Forward to gh repo for repository list, view, clone, create, fork, sync, or edit operations

args.name: args
args.summary: Repository subcommand and options, for example list, view owner/repo, clone owner/repo, or create

commands.name: issue
commands.summary: Forward to gh issue for listing, viewing, creating, editing, commenting, or closing issues

args.name: args
args.summary: Issue subcommand and options, for example list --repo owner/repo, view <number>, or create

commands.name: pr
commands.summary: Forward to gh pr for pull request list, view, checks, diff, create, review, merge, or checkout operations

args.name: args
args.summary: Pull request subcommand and options, for example list --repo owner/repo, checks <number>, or create

commands.name: org
commands.summary: Forward to gh org to manage or inspect GitHub organizations

args.name: args
args.summary: Organization subcommand and options, for example list or other gh org operations

commands.name: project
commands.summary: Forward to gh project to work with GitHub Projects

args.name: args
args.summary: Project subcommand and options, for example list, view, item-list, create, or edit

commands.name: release
commands.summary: Forward to gh release to list, view, create, upload, download, edit, or delete releases

args.name: args
args.summary: Release subcommand and options, for example list, view <tag>, create <tag>, upload, or delete

commands.name: run
commands.summary: Forward to gh run for GitHub Actions workflow run list, view, logs, rerun, watch, or cancel operations

args.name: args
args.summary: Run subcommand and options, for example list --repo owner/repo, view <run-id>, or view <run-id> --log-failed

commands.name: workflow
commands.summary: Forward to gh workflow for GitHub Actions workflow list, view, run, enable, or disable operations

args.name: args
args.summary: Workflow subcommand and options, for example list --repo owner/repo or run <workflow>

commands.name: cache
commands.summary: Forward to gh cache to manage GitHub Actions caches

args.name: args
args.summary: Cache subcommand and options, for example list, delete, or --repo owner/repo

commands.name: co
commands.summary: Forward to gh co, alias for gh pr checkout

args.name: args
args.summary: Pull request number, branch, or URL and checkout options

commands.name: agent-task
commands.summary: Forward to gh agent-task to work with GitHub agent tasks (preview)

args.name: args
args.summary: Agent task subcommand and options

commands.name: alias
commands.summary: Forward to gh alias to create, list, delete, or import command shortcuts

args.name: args
args.summary: Alias subcommand and options, for example list, set, delete, or import

commands.name: api
commands.summary: Forward to gh api for direct GitHub REST or GraphQL API requests

args.name: args
args.summary: API path and options, for example user, repos/owner/repo, graphql, --jq <filter>, or --paginate

commands.name: attestation
commands.summary: Forward to gh attestation to verify or work with artifact attestations

args.name: args
args.summary: Attestation subcommand and options, for example verify or trusted-root

commands.name: completion
commands.summary: Forward to gh completion to generate shell completion scripts

args.name: args
args.summary: Target shell, for example powershell, bash, zsh, or fish

commands.name: config
commands.summary: Forward to gh config to get, set, list, or clear GitHub CLI configuration

args.name: args
args.summary: Config subcommand and options, for example list, get <key>, set <key> <value>

commands.name: copilot
commands.summary: Forward to gh copilot to use the GitHub Copilot CLI (preview)

args.name: args
args.summary: Copilot subcommand and options, for example suggest or explain

commands.name: extension
commands.summary: Forward to gh extension to browse, install, list, upgrade, remove, or run gh extensions

args.name: args
args.summary: Extension subcommand and options, for example list, install owner/gh-ext, upgrade, or remove

commands.name: gpg-key
commands.summary: Forward to gh gpg-key to list, add, or delete GitHub GPG keys

args.name: args
args.summary: GPG key subcommand and options, for example list, add <key-file>, or delete <key-id>

commands.name: label
commands.summary: Forward to gh label to list, create, edit, clone, or delete repository labels

args.name: args
args.summary: Label subcommand and options, for example list --repo owner/repo, create, edit, or delete

commands.name: licenses
commands.summary: Forward to gh licenses to view third-party license information

args.name: args
args.summary: License subcommand or options

commands.name: preview
commands.summary: Forward to gh preview to execute previews for gh features

args.name: args
args.summary: Preview subcommand and options

commands.name: ruleset
commands.summary: Forward to gh ruleset to view information about repository rulesets

args.name: args
args.summary: Ruleset subcommand and options, for example list or view with --repo owner/repo

commands.name: search
commands.summary: Forward to gh search for repository, issue, PR, commit, or code search

args.name: args
args.summary: Search subcommand and options, for example repos <query>, issues <query>, prs <query>, or code <query>

commands.name: secret
commands.summary: Forward to gh secret to list, set, or delete GitHub Actions, Codespaces, Dependabot, environment, repo, org, or user secrets

args.name: args
args.summary: Secret subcommand and options, for example list, set <name>, delete <name>, --repo owner/repo, or --org <org>

commands.name: ssh-key
commands.summary: Forward to gh ssh-key to list, add, or delete GitHub SSH keys

args.name: args
args.summary: SSH key subcommand and options, for example list, add <key-file>, or delete <key-id>

commands.name: status
commands.summary: Forward to gh status to print information about relevant issues, pull requests, and notifications across repositories

args.name: args
args.summary: Status options, for example --org <org> or --exclude <repo>

commands.name: variable
commands.summary: Forward to gh variable to list, set, get, or delete GitHub Actions variables

args.name: args
args.summary: Variable subcommand and options, for example list, set <name>, get <name>, delete <name>, --repo owner/repo, or --org <org>

commands.name: skill
commands.summary: Forward to gh skill to install and manage GitHub CLI agent skills (preview)

args.name: args
args.summary: Skill subcommand and options, for example list, install, or remove
